allow: PowerShell($content = gh api "repos/openclaw/openclaw/contents/src/config/types.gateway.ts" --jq ".content" | %{ [Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\([Convert]::FromBase64String\($_\)\) }; $content | Out-File -Encoding utf8 "$env:TEMP\\openclaw-config-types.ts"; Select-String -Path "$env:TEMP\\openclaw-config-types.ts" -Pattern "GatewayControlUiConfig|GatewayAuthConfig|allowInsecure|allowBypass|trustedProxy" -Context 0,15 | Select-Object -First 80)

PowerShell($content = gh api "repos/openclaw/openclaw/contents/extensions/ollama/provider-discovery.ts" --jq ".content" | %{ [Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\([Convert]::FromBase64String\($_\)\) }; $content | Out-File -Encoding utf8 "$env:TEMP\\ollama-discovery.ts"; Select-String -Path "$env:TEMP\\ollama-discovery.ts" -Pattern "discovery|explicit|configured|skip" -Context 0,3 | Select-Object -First 60)

PowerShell($content = gh api "repos/openclaw/openclaw/contents/extensions/ollama/src/discovery-shared.ts" --jq ".content" 2>$null | %{ if\($_\) { [Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\([Convert]::FromBase64String\($_\)\) } }; if\($content\) { $content | Out-File -Encoding utf8 "$env:TEMP\\ollama-discovery-shared.ts"; Select-String -Path "$env:TEMP\\ollama-discovery-shared.ts" -Pattern "explicit|skip|configured|existing" -Context 1,3 | Select-Object -First 60 } else { 'file not found' })

PowerShell(gh api "repos/openclaw/openclaw/contents/extensions/openai/openclaw.plugin.json" --jq ".content" 2>$null | %{ if\($_\) { [Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\([Convert]::FromBase64String\($_\)\) } else { 'no openai extension found' } })
